summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MovieMatch app - room management, WebSocket real-time features, movie swiping interface, and match detection functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend flows mostly functional with minor navigation and clipboard permission issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Copy room code button shows clipboard permission error in browser console

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket room_started event may not properly navigate all users to swipe page - users get redirected to home due to missing localStorage user_id in new browser sessions

passed_tests: Room creation flow with unique 6-character codes
Room joining flow with username and room code
Waiting room displays all members correctly
Host/non-host role detection and UI differences
Start swiping button enabled/disabled logic (2+ members required)
Movie data loading with TMDB posters and YouTube trailers
Movie swiping interface with like/dislike buttons
Swipe recording and storage in database
Match detection when all room members like same movie
Cinema-themed dark UI with proper styling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix WebSocket navigation issue: When host clicks 'Start Swiping', ensure all connected users properly navigate to /swipe/{roomCode} page. Currently users may get redirected to home page due to localStorage user_id not persisting across WebSocket navigation events.
